field_values.action_summary: At midnight, amidst rustling and moaning sounds, the protagonist engages in a massive psychological and physical battle of will to overcome the paralysis caused by the gas.
field_values.camera_intent: Tight Close-ups (Face, straining muscles, eyes); Sound-driven shots (Focusing on the source of the moaning)
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Progression of facial muscle strain and physical exhaustion
Lighting shifts corresponding to midnight passage
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC003

## Production Intent
A high-intensity psychological and physical struggle where the protagonist fights gas-induced paralysis through sheer willpower. The scene relies on extreme close-ups to convey internal agony and external physiological strain against a backdrop of auditory hallucinations/noises.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced Earthman fighter, naked, extremely fit)

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave (dark, rocky floor, midnight)

## Continuity Constraints
- Progression of facial muscle strain and physical exhaustion
- Lighting shifts corresponding to midnight passage

## Beat List
- BT001: Paralysis and despair amidst moaning sounds
- BT002: Physical battle against the gas
- BT003: Mental breakthrough and willpower
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
